def positive_polling_loop_uses_tiny_sleep_instead_of_blocking_primitive():
    rule_id = "polling_loop_uses_tiny_sleep_instead_of_blocking_primitive"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that wake repeatedly on a tiny sleep interval instead of a blocking queue, event, or condition."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
